attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
ST.UNIQUE_EVENT_ID AS TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
ST.TRANSACTION_SOURCE  AS TRX_SRC_CD,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSOL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS TOP_SKU_SALES_RDER_LINE_KEY,
NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT ,
NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID                  ,
ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE               ,
ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION      ,
ST.OVERRIDE_FLAG                 ,
ST.OFFER_CODE                    ,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE             ,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
ST.CHARGE_TYPE                   ,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE       ,
ST.PREVIOUS_INITIAL_TERM         ,
ST.PREVIOUS_RENEWAL_TERM         ,
ST.TRX_ID                        ,
ST.ATTRIBUTION_ID                ,
ST.ATTRIBUTION_CODE              ,
NP.ITEM_KEY                      ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATE,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATE,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCFIR_BOOKINGS_DATA_ALL ST
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=COALESCE(ST.ORDER_LINE_ID,ST.PARENT_ORDER_LINE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=ST.ORDERED_ITEM
WHERE ST.TRANSACTION_SOURCE='OM'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_BOOKINGS_DATA_ALL EL WHERE EL.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID=ST.UNIQUE_EVENT_ID AND EL.ITEM_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY)

UNION ALL

SELECT 
ST.UNIQUE_EVENT_ID AS TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
ST.TRANSACTION_SOURCE  AS TRX_SRC_CD,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSOL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS TOP_SKU_SALES_RDER_LINE_KEY,
NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT ,
NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID                  ,
ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE               ,
ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION      ,
ST.OVERRIDE_FLAG                 ,
ST.OFFER_CODE                    ,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE             ,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
ST.CHARGE_TYPE                   ,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE       ,
ST.PREVIOUS_INITIAL_TERM         ,
ST.PREVIOUS_RENEWAL_TERM         ,
ST.TRX_ID                        ,
ST.ATTRIBUTION_ID                ,
ST.ATTRIBUTION_CODE              ,
NP.ITEM_KEY                      ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATE,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATE,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCFIR_BOOKINGS_DATA_ALL ST
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT=COALESCE(ST.ORDER_LINE_ID,ST.PARENT_ORDER_LINE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=ST.ORDERED_ITEM
WHERE ST.TRANSACTION_SOURCE='OPL'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_BOOKINGS_DATA_ALL EL WHERE EL.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID=ST.UNIQUE_EVENT_ID AND EL.ITEM_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY)

UNION ALL 
SELECT 
ST.UNIQUE_EVENT_ID AS TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
ST.TRANSACTION_SOURCE  AS TRX_SRC_CD,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSOL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS TOP_SKU_SALES_RDER_LINE_KEY,
NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT ,
NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID                  ,
ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE               ,
ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION      ,
ST.OVERRIDE_FLAG                 ,
ST.OFFER_CODE                    ,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE             ,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
ST.CHARGE_TYPE                   ,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE       ,
ST.PREVIOUS_INITIAL_TERM         ,
ST.PREVIOUS_RENEWAL_TERM         ,
ST.TRX_ID                        ,
ST.ATTRIBUTION_ID                ,
ST.ATTRIBUTION_CODE              ,
NP.ITEM_KEY                      ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATE,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATE,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCFIR_BOOKINGS_DATA_ALL ST
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT=COALESCE(ST.ORDER_LINE_ID,ST.PARENT_ORDER_LINE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=ST.ORDERED_ITEM
WHERE ST.TRANSACTION_SOURCE='OM'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_BOOKINGS_DATA_ALL EL WHERE EL.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID=ST.UNIQUE_EVENT_ID AND EL.ITEM_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY)

UNION ALL
SELECT 
ST.UNIQUE_EVENT_ID AS TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
ST.TRANSACTION_SOURCE  AS TRX_SRC_CD,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSOL.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY AS TOP_SKU_SALES_RDER_LINE_KEY,
NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT ,
NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID                  ,
ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE               ,
ST.ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION      ,
ST.OVERRIDE_FLAG                 ,
ST.OFFER_CODE                    ,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_CODE             ,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
ST.CHARGE_TYPE                   ,
ST.SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE       ,
ST.PREVIOUS_INITIAL_TERM         ,
ST.PREVIOUS_RENEWAL_TERM         ,
ST.TRX_ID                        ,
ST.ATTRIBUTION_ID                ,
ST.ATTRIBUTION_CODE              ,
NP.ITEM_KEY                      ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATE,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DATE,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCFIR_BOOKINGS_DATA_ALL ST
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOL
ON NSOL.SK_OPL_LINE_ID_INT=COALESCE(ST.ORDER_LINE_ID,ST.PARENT_ORDER_LINE_ID)
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID=ST.ORDERED_ITEM
WHERE ST.TRANSACTION_SOURCE='OPL'
AND NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_BOOKINGS_DATA_ALL EL WHERE EL.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID=ST.UNIQUE_EVENT_ID AND EL.ITEM_KEY=NP.ITEM_KEY)

SELECT
UNIQUE_EVENT_ID               ,
TRANSACTION_SOURCE            ,
SUBSCRIBER1                   ,
EVENT_NAME                    ,
ORDER_HEADER_ID               ,
ORDER_LINE_ID                 ,
PARENT_ORDER_LINE_ID          ,
INVENTORY_ITEM_ID             ,
ORDERED_ITEM                  ,
ACCOUNTING_RULE               ,
ACCOUNTING_RULE_DURATION      ,
OVERRIDE_FLAG                 ,
OFFER_CODE                    ,
SUBSCRIPTION_CODE             ,
SUBSCRIPTION_REF_ID           ,
CHARGE_TYPE                   ,
SUBSCRIPTION_START_DATE       ,
PREVIOUS_INITIAL_TERM         ,
PREVIOUS_RENEWAL_TERM         ,
TRX_ID                        ,
ATTRIBUTION_ID                ,
ATTRIBUTION_CODE              ,
ATTRIBUTE1                    ,
ATTRIBUTE2                    ,
ATTRIBUTE3                    ,
ATTRIBUTE4                    ,
ATTRIBUTE5                    ,
CREATED_BY                    ,
CREATION_DATE                 ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY               ,
LAST_UPDATED_DATE             ,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_XXCFIR_BOOKINGS_DATA_ALL ST
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_XXCFIR_BOOKINGS_DATA_ALL EL WHERE EL.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID=ST.UNIQUE_EVENT_ID)
